hiddenAbility.nerf: When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Speed reduced to x1.5
When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Speed reduced to x1.5

common.lore: Emerged to give shape to knowledge. When the world was still new, it shared understanding with humanity, allowing thought and memory to take root. Its presence quiets turmoil to the gods of time and space.
